query: SELECT id, vendorId, action, detail, createdAt FROM vendor_audit_log WHERE action IN ('vendor_assigned', 'vendor_unassigned') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 32vg9AA5sxnibhR.22427ce7133e --database ZQdGAya5T2keEhhUG4xk5Q --execute SELECT id, vendorId, action, detail, createdAt FROM vendor_audit_log WHERE action IN ('vendor_assigned', 'vendor_unassigned') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
